_S33_NOTE: S33 P1 batch — 9 P1 audit findings (originally 10, P1-7 dropped per PRIME-AUDIT Δ2 as audit false-positive — existing cutsceneOverlay.ts:364 comment documents belt-and-suspenders intent). Standard tier Council R1 ran 2026-05-16 (Grok-4-1-fast-non-reasoning DISRUPTOR + Gemini-2.5-flash AUDITOR). PRIME-AUDIT 2 evidence-based overrides: Δ1 REVERSE Council Q1 keep no-SCHEMA_VERSION-bump (save.ts:75 documents S15 P2 / S28 P0 / S31 P0-3 additive-optional precedent; save.ts:249 throws on schemaVersion≠1 so bumping would break legacy clients), Δ2 DROP P1-7 (false-positive). Δ3/Δ4 refinements to P1-12 (use snapshot serializer) + P1-11 (JSDoc legacy fallback). Execution order: P1-12 first (replay baseline) → cutsceneOverlay non-math (P1-9, P1-8) → math touches (P1-10, P1-11) → renames + gates (P1-13, P1-6) → docs + cleanup (P1-14, P1-15).
session_note: S33 P1 batch — close S30 audit P1 findings (9 priorities; P1-7 dropped). Replay-determinism test first as baseline; subsequent math touches guarded by it.

priorities.label: Replay determinism test (BASELINE — runs first). New src/state/save.replay.test.ts: seed two worlds identically, run identical dispatch sequence + tick advancement, assert JSON.stringify(snapshot(w1)) === JSON.stringify(snapshot(w2)). Catches future Math.random/Date.now/performance.now creep in reducers. Uses existing save.ts WorldSnapshot serializer per PRIME-AUDIT Δ3 (catches all deterministic-field drift, not hand-picked slices).
Delete dead readyState>=2 fast-path in cutsceneOverlay.ts:377-385. Branch runs BEFORE video.load() per S31 audit trace; unreachable. -3 LOC.
Consolidate 2 dup loadeddata listeners in cutsceneOverlay.ts (lines 194 + 382) into one with {once:true}. Diagnostic-log fires BEFORE setup to keep console correlation. -8 LOC.

pseudoRand consolidation. Add one-shot pseudoRand(seed, index=0): number to src/state/rng.ts (NEW export, mulberry32 generator untouched). Refactor arcFlash.ts:68 + screenShake.ts:103 to use it. Byte-exact replay-determinism preserved (math algebraically equivalent: screenShake's seed^0===seed and 0*K1===0).

Add creatureId: number to ARC_FLASH effect type in game/effects.ts. Emit from creatureAttack.ts:112. Mix into arcSeed(tick, sx, sy, creatureId) in arcFlash.ts:83. NetSnapshot pass-through in save.ts:519/558. NO SCHEMA_VERSION BUMP per PRIME-AUDIT Δ1 (S15 P2 / S28 P0 / S31 P0-3 additive-optional precedent; save.ts:249 throws on schemaVersion≠1 so bump would break legacy clients). JSDoc legacy-snapshot fallback: undefined creatureId coerces to 0 via bitwise OR, arcSeed degrades to old jitter for legacy data.

Rename cutsceneOverlay.ts private field characterSprite → videoSprite (S30 P0b: field now holds video, not character PNG). Scope: lines 11, 60, 228 (delete commented-out line entirely), 294-297, 361. RECIPE DATA FIELD UNTOUCHED: recipes/types.ts:41 + voltkin.ts:207 characterSprite STAYS (PNG path used by codex).

Phantom-shake gate forward-defense. main.ts:683-685: replace `!world.bonds.has(bondId)` with explicit `world.effects.some(e=>e.kind==='ARC_FLASH' && e.tick===world.tick)`. Functionally equivalent today; forward-defense for Anvil cleave/AOE that may sever bonds without emitting ARC_FLASH. ADD regression test to screenShake.test.ts covering both gate paths.

BACKLOG.md S20-S30 deprecation header (Council Q3=B unanimous, no full backfill). Replace line 7 staleness note with explicit redirect: 'Sessions 20-30 — authoritative record in .handoff-archive/HANDOFF_2026-05-1{2,3,4}_*.md; this file tracks plans S31+ only.' ~5 LOC change.
